html:
Exclusive to:
This content is available only after activating the Lunar Rift

Ryftstals are objects exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in From Beyond. They are crystal rocks that periodically spawn near Lunar Rifts.

Ryftstals can be mined with the Pickaxe, Opulent Pickaxe, Pick/Axe, and Brightshade Smasher. It takes 20 strikes to mine a Ryftstal with an Opulent or normal Pickaxe. However, when using the normal or Opulent Pickaxe, every 2-5 strikes the mining action will fail and the player will get pushed back. To avoid being pushed back and have higher efficiency, the player can use Pick/Axe and Brightshade Smasher to mine the Ryftstals in 15 strikes, or use Weather Pain.

It is possible to explode the crystal with either 2 Gunpowder, 2 Brightshade Bombs or 20 Slurtle Slime.

Trivia

  • An unused smaller version exists, see Ryftstal (Small).

“Crystallized illuminosity.”
–Wilson

–Willow

–WX-78
“These crystalline structures have grown at a rapid rate.”
–Wickerbottom
“Glitterin' like icicles on a winter morning.”
–Woodie
“Crystals? How very Bohemian.”
–Maxwell
“Höw strange... and beautiful.”
–Wigfrid
“They look like candy, but they're just rocks.”
–Webber
“Tres beau!”
–Warly
“Shiny”
–Wormwood
“It's about the prettiest tripping hazard you'll ever see.”
–Winona
“Glint and glitter.”
–Wortox
“Blegh, it not ice!”
–Wurt
“I need to start a new rock collection!”
–Walter
“Some kind of temporal residue, perhaps?”
–Wanda
Ryftstals are objects exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in From Beyond. They are crystal rocks that periodically spawn near Lunar Rifts.
Ryftstals can be mined with the Pickaxe, Opulent Pickaxe, Pick/Axe, and Brightshade Smasher. It takes 20 strikes to mine a Ryftstal with an Opulent or normal Pickaxe. However, when using the normal or Opulent Pickaxe, every 2-5 strikes the mining action will fail and the player will get pushed back. To avoid being pushed back and have higher efficiency, the player can use Pick/Axe and Brightshade Smasher to mine the Ryftstals in 15 strikes, or use Weather Pain.
It is possible to explode the crystal with either 2 Gunpowder, 2 Brightshade Bombs or 20 Slurtle Slime.

'''Ryftstals''' are objects exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[From Beyond]]''. They are crystal rocks that periodically spawn near [[Lunar Rift|Lunar Rifts]].

Ryftstals can be mined with the [[Pickaxe]], [[Opulent Pickaxe]], [[Pick/Axe|Pick/Axe,]] and [[Brightshade Smasher]]. It takes 20 strikes to mine a Ryftstal with an Opulent or normal Pickaxe. However, when using the normal or Opulent Pickaxe, every 2-5 strikes the mining action will fail and the player will get pushed back. To avoid being pushed back and have higher efficiency, the player can use Pick/Axe and Brightshade Smasher to mine the Ryftstals in 15 strikes, or use [[Weather Pain]].

It is possible to explode the crystal with either 2 [[Gunpowder]], 2 [[Brightshade Bomb|Brightshade Bombs]] or 20 [[Slurtle Slime]].

=={{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* An unused smaller version exists, see [[Unimplemented Structures/DST#Ryftstal (Small)|Ryftstal (Small)]].
